mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT business_domain_id FROM domain_member WHERE staff_account_id = #{staffAccountId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY business_domain_id

SELECT DISTINCT dr.code FROM domain_member dm JOIN domain_member_role dmr ON dmr.domain_member_id = dm.id JOIN domain_role dr ON dr.id = dmr.domain_role_id WHERE dm.staff_account_id = #{staffAccountId} AND dm.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dr.code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_member ( staff_account_id, business_domain_id, status, source, activated_at, disabled_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES (#{staffAccountId}, #{businessDomainId}, 'active', 'manual', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
INSERT INTO domain_member_role (domain_member_id, domain_role_id, created_at) VALUES (#{domainMemberId}, #{domainRoleId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
